working_on: Routine task P5-04a: Ethics metaethics+normative seed — sixth routine-mode session against T-PHASE-5; pre-split a-half (P5-04b is the applied-ethics b-half) per phase_5.md T1-B with depends_on [P5-01a] satisfied since S-0050.
